title: Resource Estimation for Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computing
description: Learn to estimate the physical resources required for fault-tolerant quantum algorithms, including qubit counts, gate counts, runtime analysis, and the trade-offs between different error correction codes.
learningObjectives: Calculate logical qubit requirements from algorithm specifications
Estimate physical qubit overhead for surface code implementations
Analyze T-gate costs and magic state distillation requirements
Evaluate runtime bounds for fault-tolerant algorithms
Compare resource estimates across different error correction schemes
